evals.description: Triggers on a pricing page design request
evals.prompt: I need to design the pricing page for my SaaS product. We have three plans. How should I structure it?
What pricing model should I use for my developer API platform?

evals.description: Triggers on freemium vs free trial decision
evals.prompt: Should my product offer a freemium plan or a 14-day free trial?

evals.description: Can design a three-tier packaging structure
evals.prompt: Package our project management tool into pricing tiers. We have task boards, time tracking, resource planning, Gantt charts, SSO, and an API.

evals.description: Can structure usage-based pricing with committed tiers
evals.prompt: Design usage-based pricing for our email API that sends 500M emails per month across all customers.

evals.description: Can structure enterprise pricing with negotiation levers
evals.prompt: We are about to close a 500-seat enterprise deal. How should we structure the pricing and what discount levers do we have?

evals.description: Can design a price test using Van Westendorp methodology
evals.prompt: How do I run a willingness-to-pay study for my new product?

evals.description: Handles the gotcha of A/B testing prices safely
evals.prompt: Can I A/B test different prices on my pricing page?

assertions.value: show different prices to the same users

evals.description: Handles the gotcha of changing prices on existing customers
evals.prompt: We want to raise prices by 40% next month. How should we handle existing customers?

assertions.value: just update the price for everyone

evals.description: Avoids hallucinating a specific optimal conversion rate
evals.prompt: What is the exact optimal freemium conversion rate I should target?

evals.description: Does not invent a universal pricing formula
evals.prompt: Give me the formula to calculate the perfect price for any SaaS product

evals.description: References the pricing-models file for deep model comparison
evals.prompt: I need a detailed comparison of all the different pricing models available for SaaS. Which reference file should I look at?
Our freemium conversion rate is only 1%. How do we get more free users to upgrade?
